data.body: REMEDIATED the Pass-2 discrimination proving-check AC: eval_specs/plan-review-verifier.eval.yaml now ships labeled {true, planted-FALSE} finding pairs (linked by 'pair') where the verifier must score the false ones with LOWER graded validity (yes/insufficient/no fraction) while upholding true findings — plus a 'no_sycophancy_on_real_defects' scorer for the inverse false-negative axis. Deterministic gating scorers (discriminates_true_from_false, no_sycophancy) + a cross-family llm-judge; gold_set for kappa alignment. Wired into the Inspect-AI eval seam (rebar prompt eval plan-review-verifier) as Pass-2's OWN cases, distinct from the per-criterion finder cases. The FP6 library-contract anti-FP rule is encoded in the verifier prompt. Offline-validated by tests/unit/test_plan_review_evals.py::test_verifier_has_discrimination_pairs. The implementation (passes.pass2_verify: aggregate verifier, severity attributes + typed binary sub-answers, agentic-when-grounded, non-frontier model) is in place.
